generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance OutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque and velocity from motor constants using input current and encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models processing input data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables WhiteBoxFrictionModelIdentificationService, BlackBoxFrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetDescriptionService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of simulated versus measured data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using white-box approach"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using black-box approach"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of simulated versus measured data in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction compensation for robot control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance AssetDescriptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset description using Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetDescriptionInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelingInsight
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction losses through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of deviations between simulated and measured data for motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control algorithms based on friction compensation to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AssetDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset description details for the robot axis"
]

instance StructuralModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for the robot axis"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor accepting current input and outputting torque"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component transforming rotational energy within the drive train"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component transforming torque within the drive train"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining applications with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance focused exclusively on the first axis of the robot"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization between physical system and digital shadow, with continuous live measurements during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streams via MQTT, digital shadow model (data traces, processing components, engineering/simulation models), and dashboard for unified monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), utilizing live data during robot operation for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to assess friction model accuracy; white-box and black-box model integration for multi-physics-aware identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for asset description and SysML for systems engineering modeling."
]
